content: I'll call them tomorrow when I come back.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by papabear (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ber:Ad asen-ɣreɣ azekka mi ara d-qqleɣ
dan:Jeg ringer til dem i morgen, når jeg kommer tilbage
epo:Mi telefonos al ili morgaŭ post mia reveno
ile:Yo va telefonar les deman quande yo retorna
ina:Io les telephonara deman quando io retornara
mkd:Ќе им се јавам утре откако ќе се вратам
nob:Jeg ringer dem i morgen når jeg kommer tilbake
ron:Îi voi suna mâine când mă întorc
sat:ᱤᱧ ᱛᱤᱧ ᱡᱷᱚᱜ ᱤᱧ ᱦᱟᱹᱡᱩᱜᱼᱟ ᱟᱠᱚ ᱤᱧ ᱦᱚᱦᱚ ᱟ ᱠᱚᱣᱟ ᱾
slv:Poklical jih bom jutri, ko se vrnem
srp:Zvaću ih sutra kada se vratim
tha:ฉันจะโทรหาพวกเขาพรุ่งนี้เมื่อฉันกลับมา
kab:Ad asen-siweleɣ azekka mi ara d-uɣaleɣ
rus:Я позвоню им завтра, когда вернусь
